record.field: invoice = env['account.move'].create({'move_type': 'in_invoice', 'x_task_id': record.id}) action = env['ir.actions.act_window']._for_xml_id('account.action_move_in_invoice_type') action['views'] = [(env.ref('account.view_move_form').id, 'form')] action['res_id'] = invoice.id

analytic_account_id = env['account.analytic.account'].create({ 'name': record.name, 'partner_id': record.partner_id.id, 'code': record.partner_id.ref, 'plan_id': env.ref('handyman.analytic_plan_field_service').id, }) record['x_analytic_account_id'] = analytic_account_id.id

analytic_account_id = record.x_analytic_account_id analytic_account_id['name'] = record.name analytic_account_id['partner_id'] = record.partner_id analytic_account_id['code'] = record.partner_id.ref analytic_account_id['active'] = record.active

account_move_lines = env['account.move.line'].search_fetch([('move_id.move_type', '=', 'in_invoice'), ('analytic_distribution', 'in', record.x_analytic_account_id.ids)], ['move_id']) action = env['ir.actions.act_window']._for_xml_id('account.action_move_in_invoice_type') action['domain'] = [('id', 'in', account_move_lines.move_id.ids)] action['context'] = {'default_move_type': 'in_invoice'}
